en: Turned up with my niggas, turned up with my bitches, turned up in my shows, yeah, cause I'm right here with me
ko: 내 친구들이랑 신나게, 내 여자들이랑 신나게.

en: Off a fifth of hen, getting fucked up with my twin, got a backwood full of top, and a bankroll full of Benz
All that Twitter typing, bitches see me and they ain't do nothing, crop top with some bikers shorts, I'm showing off my moves, nigga
ko: 트위터에서 떠들어대지만, 날 보면 아무것도 못 해.

en: I'm feeling good today, I'm outside with your baby, got a brown skin nigga with dreads, and a black ass nigga with waves

en: He gon' drop that neck, he love the way I sit, fake niggas, bitches, pricks, so high, damn, the red, I keep this pussy fresh
Keep this shirt on wet, who won't smoke, say what? Oh, get that off your chest
ko: 누가 피우고 싶어? 뭐라고? 가슴에 있는 거 다 쏟아내.

en: Turned up with my niggas, turned up with my bitches, turned up in my shows, yeah, cause I got that bleakie

en: Sixty thousand fans came to see me do my dance, got a million and one haters, and they all can kiss my ass
ko: 백만 명이 넘는 안티가 있어, 다 내 엉덩이나 키스해.

en: It's 7 p.m. Friday, it's 95 degrees, I ain't got no nigga, and no nigga ain't got me
